ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the city */,
  "tourism_index" REAL /* Metric indicating the level of tourism in the city */,
  "seasonal_population" INTEGER /* Population during peak tourist seasons */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city linked to the weather data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data entry */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded on that date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diner_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diner rating */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city linked to the diner rating */,
  "diner_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the diner on a scale (e.g., 4/5) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dining location */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating */,
  "review" TEXT /* Textual review or comment from the diner */,
  "diner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diner (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diner_ratings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES dining_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diner_ratings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dining_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dining location */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the location is situated */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the dining location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dining location (e.g., fast food, casual dining) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the dining location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the dining location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the dining location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the dining location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the dining location */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of a meal at the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dining_locations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the event is taking place */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the event within the city */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_events_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature range */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature of the range */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature of the range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the temperature range */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season associated with the temperature range */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the temperature range data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diner_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diner rating entry */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diner_analysis_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES diner_ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diner_analysis_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
